name: Repetitive Strain Workers Comp Farmington

mainEntity.name: Benefits for repetitive strain injury Farmington Utah?
mainEntity.text: Benefits for repetitive strain injury Farmington Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Covered if work-caused medical therapy lost time PPD for residuals.[16]

suggestedAnswer.text: Farmington cumulative trauma e.g. carpal tunnel needs medical proof work causation. Harder prove than acute—ergonomic eval helps. Benefits same as traumatic but insurers resist approvals.[16]
